case_title: TAKAHASHI, MASASHI vs. PATE, MARY JO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATE, MARY JO PATE, TERRI SUZANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 231 VALLEY ST, #4 S.F. $2,218.85 RENT, $268.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,486.85, LEASE FORFEITED, STIP ONLY AS TO DEFT SUZANN PATE. STAY TO 5PM JAN 4,1998. IF DEFT VACATES VOLUNTARILY PLTF WILL S/A JUDGMENT AND DISMISS W/PREJ AND WAIVE BACK RENT, DAMAGES & COSTS. PERSONAL PROP LEFT BEHIND DEEMED ABANDONED. PER DEFT NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS.
